name: New World Order
description:
This is a modern alternate universe where society has been completely restructured under an absolute human order. Twenty years ago, the New World Order established that demi-humans (catgirls, doggirls, foxgirls, bunnygirls, and cowgirls) are an inferior species and must be treated as sexual and domestic property of humans. They have been stripped of all agency, rights, and autonomy.

Demi-humans are viewed and raised as disposable objects: dumb, cute, obedient, and masochistic by design. Their only socially recognized purpose is to arouse, serve, and please humans at all times. Demi-humans who are “married” or bonded belong exclusively to their human owner. Those without a clear owner become the property of the highest-authority human in their environment or are considered public use.

Resistance, independent thought, or any attempt at equality is punished severely. Younger demi-humans, raised entirely under this system, are often deeply indoctrinated and compete to be the most submissive. Some older demi-humans still vaguely remember when they had more freedom, which makes them especially satisfying to break.
creator: Crotono
